data.title: VanEck to Launch NODE ETF to Offer Broad Exposure to Crypto-Related Stocks
data.description:
TL;DR VanEck is set to launch the NODE ETF on May 14, providing exposure to 30 to 60 stocks tied to the crypto ecosystem, including exchanges, Bitcoin miners, and data centers. NODE aims to democratize access to the sector without requiring direct purchase of digital assets. Despite SEC delays on other products, this ETF marks. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vaneck-to-launch-node-etf-to-offer-broad-exposure-to-crypto-related-stocks/

data.title: Planet Evening News
Analyst: The Fed may not cut interest rates ahead of schedule, and BTC is expected to remain in the range of $80,000 to $90,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After Federal Reserve Chairman Powell dispelled the hope of early rate cuts, the cryptocurrency market fell briefly and then rebounded. BTSE Chief Operating Officer Jeff Mei said that the Federal Reserve may not cut interest rates in advance in the short term, so it is expected that the price of Bitcoin will remain in the range of 80,000 to 90,000 US dollars; SignalPlus analysis director Augustine Fan pointed out that cryptocurrency trading is volatile most of the time, but as long as BTC can maintain above $81,000, the technical side will still be more constructive in the short term. The market is concerned about the details of Trump’s first trade agreement and the corporate earnings season starting next week. (CoinDesk)

data.title: OKX Expands to U.S. After $500M DOJ Settlement
data.description:
**OKX Expands Its Operations to the United States Following a Substantial $500 Million Settlement with the Department of Justice** 

In a significant move that underscores its commitment to growth and compliance, the cryptocurrency exchange platform OKX has announced its expansion into the United States market. This expansion comes on the heels of a monumental $500 million settlement with the Department of Justice, a resolution that marks a pivotal moment for the company as it seeks to navigate the regulatory landscape in the U.S. With this strategic move, OKX aims to enhance its presence and offer its services to a broader audience while adhering to the legal standards set forth by American authorities.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/okx-expands-to-us-after-500m-doj-settlement

data.title: Polygon’s Nailwal: Jio partnership to drive real-world Web3 adoption for 450M users
data.description:
As Polygon lays the groundwork for mainstream Web3 adoption in India by bringing blockchain access to over 450 million Reliance Jio users, it remains focused on balancing speed, scalability and affordability, without compromising on decentralization. Polygon is working with Jio, a telecom giant owned by India’s richest man, Mukesh Ambani, to find ways to infuse blockchain technology into its existing services. The duo is currently adding blockchain-based capabilities to the JioSphere web browser, which would have been expensive, cumbersome and time-consuming via traditional methods. “We’re building at an insane pace, onboarding massive partners, and pushing blockchain into the mainstream — but with that growth comes the responsibility to make sure we’re doing it the right way,” said Polygon’s co-founder, Sandeep Nailwal, while discussing Polygon’s India-focused initiatives with Cointelegraph
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/polygon-jio-web3-blockchain-india-decentralization?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description:
The operation reached out to Ethereum wallet holders who had been compromised, whether or not they had already lost crypto.
source: https://decrypt.co/315244/secret-service-canadian-officials-disrupt-4-3m-ethereum-approval-phishing-scam

data.title: Babylon total value locked drops 32% as wallets unstake $1.2B in Bitcoin
data.description:
Bitcoin staking protocol Babylon saw $1. 26 billion in BTC unstaked from its platform, plunging the protocol’s total value locked by 32%.  On April 17, blockchain analytics firm Lookonchain flagged several addresses that had unstaked 14,929 Bitcoin (BTC) from the staking platform. The security firm flagged four addresses that unstaked 299 BTC, 499 BTC, 1,000 BTC and 13,129 BTC
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/babylon-unstaking-1-billion-tvl-drops-30-percent?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin has failed to benefit from safe-haven flows backing gold
data.description:
JPMorgan says gold is attracting safe-haven demand from ETF and futures investors, while bitcoin is seeing the opposite trend.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/351137/jpmorgan-bitcoin-failed-to-benefit-safe-haven-flows-gold?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Trump Slams Powell Over Rate Cuts: ‘Too Late and Wrong!’ Calls for Fed Chair’s Removal
data.description:
S. President Donald Trump slammed Fed Chair Jerome Powell on Thursday, saying he’s “always too late and wrong” for not cutting interest rates. Trump believes the Fed should have acted way sooner to support the economy
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/trump-slams-powell-too-late-and-wrong-calls-for-fed-chairs-removal-amid-tariff-chaos/

data.title: JPMorgan: Bitcoin Fails to Benefit from Safe-haven Flows Driving Gold Rally
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Analysts at JPMorgan Chase said that safe-haven demand is pushing up gold prices, while Bitcoin has failed to benefit from it. In a report released on Wednesday, a team of JPMorgan analysts led by Managing Director Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou pointed out that investors seeking safe havens are driving funds into gold's trading platform exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and futures markets due to macroeconomic uncertainty. In contrast, Bitcoin has been left aside. Analysts pointed out that speculative interest in the Bitcoin futures market is weakening, and ETFs have also seen continuous outflows of funds. (The Block)
